$comment: Precision fixtures for the NON-ENGLISH avoid[] rows in terminology.json (FR-3051). Consumed by scripts/check-terminology-i18n.selftest.mjs, which exercises the REAL CHECK 1 matcher. Every non-en avoid row MUST have exactly one entry here (keyed by lang+avoid); the harness fails on missing or stale entries. positiveFixtures are synthetic strings the row MUST match (detectability); negativeFixtures are legitimate strings it must NOT match (precision) — always include the known longer preferred compounds the term could collide with. falsePositiveBudget caps the row's live hit-count over the CURRENT i18n stores (default: defaultFalsePositiveBudget); a bare concept noun like ko "세션" (~200 live values) can never fit the budget, which is exactly the gate that keeps noisy rows out of the termbase. negativeControls are known-bad bare-noun rows the harness intentionally evaluates and REQUIRES to exceed the budget — if a control stops exceeding it, the gate has lost its teeth.

positiveFixtures: 이 배포에는 자동 스케일링이 설정되어 있습니다.

negativeFixtures: 슈퍼 관리자만 이 설정을 변경할 수 있습니다.

rows.avoid: スケーリンググループ
positiveFixtures: スケーリンググループを選択してください。
このスケーリンググループにはエージェントがありません。
negativeFixtures: リソースグループを選択してください。
自動スケーリングルールを追加します。
リソースグループのスケジューラを設定します。

negativeControls.$comment: Bare concept noun; substring of the preferred compounds 연산 세션 / 배치 세션 / 추론 세션. Measured 201 legitimate ko values (resources/i18n + BUI locale) at FR-3051 authoring time — a row like this MUST always blow the falsePositiveBudget. The floor of 50 is intentionally conservative (~25% of measured) so a legitimate large-scale i18n refactor cannot false-trip the teeth gate.

Bare concept noun; substring of コンピュートセッション and every session-type compound. Measured 196 legitimate ja values at FR-3051 authoring time; floor 50 is intentionally conservative, same rationale as the ko control.
